entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Photoperiod sensitive genotype NC Ac 17090 of Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD
entities.description: The length of daylength, including natural and artificially manipulated conditions.

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The reproductive growth phase of the groundnut plant.

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: The experimental approach used to compare growth and development under different photoperiods.

entities.name: THERMAL TIME TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The accumulated thermal time required for the plant to reach the flowering stage.

entities.name: FLOWER APPEARANCE
entities.description: The process and rate of flowers appearing on the plant.

entities.name: THERMAL TIME PEG TO POD
entities.description: The thermal time elapsed between the initiation of a peg and the formation of a pod.

entities.name: THERMAL TIME TO FRUIT MATURITY
entities.description: The thermal time required for a fruit or pod to reach maturity.

entities.name: ASSIMILATE PARTITIONING
entities.description: The distribution of assimilates to the pods.

entities.name: POD INITIATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which pods are initiated.

entities.name: PARTITIONING COEFFICIENT
entities.description: The coefficient representing the partitioning of assimilates.
